indoor.hero.title: Indoor immersive experience
indoor.hero.description: Immerse in local life. Feel the real China in a cozy space.
indoor.intro.title: Service Introduction
indoor.intro.subtitle: A small private indoor experience rooted in real local life
indoor.intro.para1: Indoor Experiential Activity is a small-scale private indoor experience led by local university students in Beijing, rooted in authentic local spaces and rejecting scripted performances. Through culinary crafts, cultural experiences, and relaxed conversations, you can get close to everyday life in China and connect naturally with local youth and international friends.
indoor.intro.para2: In a relaxed atmosphere, we break cultural barriers and help you feel the most vibrant and human side of China.
indoor.intro.offers.item1: Passionate local Beijing youth as your cultural hosts, not rigid tour guides.
indoor.intro.offers.item2: Hands-on Chinese lifestyle experiences with take-home food or creations and memorable moments.
indoor.intro.offers.item3: A pressure-free cross-cultural communication environment for relaxed conversation and easy friendship.
indoor.intro.offers.item4: Intimate small-group experiences away from tourist zones to feel authentic local warmth.

indoor.part2.title: II. Product Features
indoor.part2.subtitle: What's different about it?
indoor.part2.rows.row1.label: Local host country
indoor.part2.rows.row1.value: All hosts are fluent English-speaking university students in Beijing who are platform-trained and certified, passionate about sharing local culture and skilled in cross-cultural communication.
indoor.part2.rows.row2.label: Experience Scenario
indoor.part2.rows.row2.value: Rooted in authentic local spaces in Beijing, such as residences, community studios, and local cafes, instead of tourist-only venues.
indoor.part2.rows.row3.label: Small group experience
indoor.part2.rows.row3.value: Each session is strictly limited to 8 participants to ensure enough communication and guidance time with deeper interaction.
indoor.part2.rows.row4.label: pressure-free atmosphere
indoor.part2.rows.row4.value: No forced interaction and no scripted performance. The pace is relaxed with open participation and real-time communication.
indoor.part2.rows.row5.label: Bilingual throughout
indoor.part2.rows.row5.value: The whole process is conducted in English, with simple bilingual instructions for hands-on activities so beginners can join easily.
indoor.part3.title: III. Event Flow
indoor.part3.subtitle: How is one indoor immersive experience conducted?
indoor.part3.steps.step1.title: Before the experience
indoor.part3.steps.step1.content: Receive a confirmation email. The platform sends theme details, meeting point, and transport guidance. You may note personal interests or dietary restrictions for advance adjustment.
indoor.part3.steps.step2.title: Meeting up
indoor.part3.steps.step2.content: The host waits at the agreed location, introduces themselves, runs an ice-breaker, and explains the process and precautions.
indoor.part3.steps.step3.title: Experience process
indoor.part3.steps.step3.content: Hands-on activities, entertainment, and themed discussions are guided throughout, with real-time answers and cultural explanations.
indoor.part3.steps.step4.title: Interactive moments
indoor.part3.steps.step4.content: Each experience includes free discussion nodes so participants can chat while making and playing with local youth and international friends.
indoor.part3.steps.step5.title: Wrap-up
indoor.part3.steps.step5.content: Taste culinary results on-site, take home handicrafts, get more local recommendations from the host, and freely exchange contacts.
indoor.part3.steps.step6.title: After the experience
indoor.part3.steps.step6.content: The platform sends a recap email with cultural notes and similar local recommendations. You can rate and review the host.
indoor.part4.title: IV. Core Route Details
indoor.part4.subtitle: Four themed indoor experiences
indoor.part4.exp.a.title: Experience A  Culinary Workshop
indoor.part4.exp.a.topic: Topic: Make Beijing-style dishes by hand and enjoy your own Chinese meal
indoor.part4.exp.a.intro: From beginner prep to finished dishes, this workshop focuses on classic local tastes instead of internet trends. Even first-timers can complete the process and taste the result immediately.
indoor.part4.exp.a.nodes.node1: Ice-break and culture intro: host explains local food background, steps, and practical tips.
indoor.part4.exp.a.nodes.node2: Ingredient prep: process ingredients under host guidance and learn Chinese cooking basics.
indoor.part4.exp.a.nodes.node3: Handmade cooking: choose Beijing snacks (Ludagun, Aiwoowo) or classic food (dumplings, mooncakes) with one-on-one guidance.
indoor.part4.exp.a.nodes.node4: Tasting: enjoy your own dishes with local beverages while discussing Chinese food culture.
indoor.part4.exp.a.nodes.node5: Closing: receive a local food list and learn simple Chinese ordering phrases.
indoor.part4.exp.a.special: Learn 3-5 practical Chinese food phrases, such as This is really delicious and One more serving, and use them on-site while tasting.
indoor.part4.exp.a.audience: Food lovers / complete beginners / anyone who likes relaxed learning
indoor.part4.exp.b.title: Experience B  Cultural Handicrafts
indoor.part4.exp.b.topic: Topic: Make your own Chinese cultural creative product and bring memories home
indoor.part4.exp.b.intro: Representative traditional crafts are selected with simplified process and preserved making joy. You learn heritage and aesthetics while creating a take-home piece.
indoor.part4.exp.b.nodes.node1: Cultural mini-class: host introduces stories behind crafts such as Chinese knots and paper-cutting.
indoor.part4.exp.b.nodes.node2: Material explanation: understand craft materials and basic techniques.
indoor.part4.exp.b.nodes.node3: Creation: choose classic heritage (paper-cutting, Chinese knots) or Chinese aesthetics (calligraphy bookmarks, fan painting).
indoor.part4.exp.b.nodes.node4: Refinement: polish your work with host assistance and learn simple packaging.
indoor.part4.exp.b.nodes.node5: Closing: share cultural meaning and learn to introduce your work in Chinese.
indoor.part4.exp.b.special: Each participant receives a personalized commemorative card with the work title and cultural meaning.
indoor.part4.exp.b.audience: Traditional culture enthusiasts / souvenir collectors / hands-on learners
indoor.part4.exp.c.title: Experience C  Traditional Entertainment
indoor.part4.exp.c.topic: Topic: Unlock Chinese leisure time with local favorite games
indoor.part4.exp.c.intro: Classic local entertainment is adapted for beginners. The host guides throughout so participants can enjoy Chinese-style leisure and understand local social interaction.
indoor.part4.exp.c.nodes.node1: Rule explanation: host explains in simple English and demonstrates gameplay for quick onboarding.
indoor.part4.exp.c.nodes.node2: Group play: choose classic board games or Chinese-style games and play in flexible groups.
indoor.part4.exp.c.nodes.node3: Fun challenge: small competitions with little prizes.
indoor.part4.exp.c.nodes.node4: Interactive chat: discuss local entertainment customs and youth leisure habits in Beijing.
indoor.part4.exp.c.special: Games include Chinese cultural trivia such as mahjong tile symbolism and gomoku origins.
indoor.part4.exp.c.audience: People who like light interaction / want to learn youth leisure culture / enjoy making friends
indoor.part4.exp.d.title: Experience D  Easy and Unimpeded Communication
indoor.part4.exp.d.topic: Topic: Sit together and discuss daily life across cultures
indoor.part4.exp.d.intro: No rigid process and no fixed topics. In a cozy local setting, local youth and international friends share tea, coffee, and stories across daily life and culture.
indoor.part4.exp.d.nodes.node1: Free icebreaking: each participant introduces themselves in one sentence and shares a travel story or reason for coming to Beijing.
indoor.part4.exp.d.nodes.node2: Topic guidance: host proposes light topics and keeps the conversation flowing.
indoor.part4.exp.d.nodes.node3: Boundless conversation: free discussion with host support on China life and culture questions.
indoor.part4.exp.d.nodes.node4: Fun interaction: mini quiz and guessing games with local snacks as prizes.
indoor.part4.exp.d.special: Hosts prepare culture-difference topic cards so conversations stay focused and meaningful.
indoor.part4.exp.d.audience: People who enjoy cross-cultural exchange / want to make friends / want deeper understanding of China daily life
indoor.part5.title: V. Purpose and Design Philosophy
indoor.part5.subtitle: Why this design
indoor.part5.para1: The core design principle of Indoor Experiential Activity is simple: transform foreign friends from experiencing China to participating in China.
indoor.part5.para2: Most existing products are passive and performance-like. Participants rarely touch authentic local life or deeply communicate with locals. Local university student hosts bridge this gap with both local understanding and international awareness.
indoor.part5.para3: Through small groups, making, and conversation, the format shifts from one-way reception to two-way interaction. We hope everyone leaves with personal China memories and like-minded friends.
indoor.part6.title: VI. Fee Information
indoor.part6.subtitle: Transparent pricing for each experience style
indoor.part6.rows.row1.label: Trial version (1.5-2 hours)
indoor.part6.rows.row2.label: Handmade (2-3 hours)
indoor.part6.rows.row3.label: Casual conversation (2-3 hours)
indoor.part6.rows.row4.label: Handmade Material Upgrade Fee
indoor.part6.rows.row5.label: Group discounts
indoor.part6.rows.row6.label: Student discounts
indoor.part6.rows.row6.value: 10% off with valid student ID (not combined with group discounts)
indoor.part6.rows.row7.label: include
indoor.part6.rows.row7.value: Host full-process guidance / basic materials / beverages / post-experience culture package
indoor.part6.rows.row8.label: free from
indoor.part6.rows.row8.value: Upgrade material fees / personal additional spending / shipping fees for finished products
indoor.part7.title: VII. Purchase Guidelines
indoor.part7.subtitle: Read carefully before booking
indoor.part7.items.item1: Each session is strictly limited to 8 participants. Booking closes automatically when full. It is recommended to book at least 3 days in advance.
indoor.part7.items.item2: The experience is fully indoor and unaffected by weather. Comfortable, loose clothing is recommended for hands-on activities.
indoor.part7.items.item3: For culinary sessions, dietary restrictions can be noted in advance, such as vegetarian preference or nut allergy.
indoor.part7.items.item4: Please arrive on time. If you are more than 10 minutes late, contact the host in advance to avoid affecting progress.
indoor.part7.items.item5: Photography is allowed during the experience, but please do not capture private images of hosts or participants without consent.
indoor.part7.items.item6: Handmade cultural products can be taken away on-site. If shipping is needed, shipping cost is at your expense and the host can assist.
indoor.part7.refund.title: Refund Policy
indoor.part7.refund.row1.label: Cancel 72+ hours before experience
indoor.part7.refund.row2.label: Cancel 24-72 hours before experience
indoor.part7.refund.row3.label: Cancel within 24 hours before experience
indoor.part7.refund.row3.value: No refund, but one free reschedule (valid for 1 month)
indoor.part7.refund.row4.label: Cancelled by platform or host
indoor.part8.title: VIII. Service Ordering Process
indoor.part8.subtitle: Complete booking in four steps
indoor.part8.steps.step1.title: Step 1  Select experience and tier
indoor.part8.steps.step1.content: On this page, select experience theme (A/B/C/D) and duration tier (trial/handmade/casual), confirm fees, and click Book Now.
indoor.part8.steps.step2.title: Step 2  Fill in registration information
indoor.part8.steps.step2.content: Provide name, contact email, number of participants, preferred dates, and notes on dietary restrictions or special needs.
indoor.part8.steps.step3.title: Step 3  Wait for confirmation email
indoor.part8.steps.step3.content: Within 48 hours, the platform sends meeting map, host profile, experience details, and checklist. Booking is confirmed after receiving this email.
indoor.part8.steps.step4.title: Step 4  Attend the experience
indoor.part8.steps.step4.content: Meet the host at the confirmed time and location and begin your indoor immersive China experience.
indoor.part9.title: IX. Contact Information
indoor.part9.subtitle: Reach us anytime for booking or consultation
indoor.part9.rows.row1.label: Indoor experience booking email
indoor.part9.rows.row2.label: General consultation email
indoor.part9.rows.row3.label: Reply time
indoor.part9.rows.row3.value: Reply within 48 working hours (extended to weekends and holidays)
indoor.part9.rows.row4.label: Emergency contact
indoor.part9.rows.row4.value: If there are last-minute changes on experience day, reply to the confirmation email or contact the host directly.
indoor.part9.note: For special requirements such as customized experiences, vegan adaptation, or group customization, note them in the booking form or email us directly. We will coordinate as best as possible.
